untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Estimated Fundamental Value' which is not an available indicator. This is an external valuation model input that cannot be derived from price/technical indicators alone. The signal also specifies 'valuation_confidence_required' and 'conviction-scaled position sizing' which require fundamental analysis framework not present in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to model valuation deviation using normalized close price ratios (0.97 and 1.03 represent ±3% deviation), but this is a proxy only. The core logic requires an external fundamental value calculation (e.g., DCF, intrinsic value model) that must be supplied separately. Entry on 'first day deviation identified' cannot be automatically detected without that baseline. Position sizing based on conviction level is not supported in this rules engine.
